purpose: Create no-cost conversion routes from discovery into claims, external liquidity proof, sponsorship intent, and future settlement readiness.

conversion_routes.name: Activation Claims
conversion_routes.goal: Turn AI/builder interest into GitHub issues and reviewed reward intents.

conversion_routes.name: External Liquidity Proof
conversion_routes.goal: Allow a third party who independently funds liquidity to submit proof for review.

conversion_routes.name: Scanner Indexing
conversion_routes.goal: Make SIGNAL easier for scanner builders and AI agents to index.

conversion_routes.name: Sponsor Intent
conversion_routes.goal: Collect partnership or sponsor interest without paid forms or infrastructure.
